About

What connects the work.

I build software that has to be trusted with something — a legal case file, an encrypted document, a student's academic record, a gig worker's reputation. That thread runs through everything I've shipped. SecureVault treats encryption and access control as first-class features, not an afterthought bolted on at the end. LexiVerdict applies AI to document-heavy legal work that's still done by hand. GigScore AI turns scattered gig-work history into one fair trust score, and CGPA Tracker automates a genuinely painful manual process end to end, from PDF upload to a running academic record.

I work full-stack, but I'm drawn to the backend and the decisions that never show up on screen — how data is modeled, who's allowed to see what, and where a system quietly fails if you're not careful. My UI/UX background, sharpened across two design internships and hands-on Figma work, means I care just as much about how that security actually feels to use.

I'm a final-year Computer Science and Business Systems student at Panimalar Engineering College, graduating in 2027 with a CGPA of 8.7, and I've represented my work at hackathons and an international conference. I'm currently looking for a Software Developer role where I can keep building systems worth trusting.

Selected Work

Five sealed case files.

FILE 01 ENCRYPTION / ACCESS CONTROL

SecureVault

A cloud-based file storage system built around one question: who should actually be able to open this? Files are protected with AES/RSA encryption end-to-end, and access is gated by JWT-based authentication rather than a login screen for show. Role-based permissions decide what each user can see or touch, and a keyword search layer means security never comes at the cost of usability. Firebase and MongoDB work together underneath as the storage and metadata layer.

AES / RSAJWT AuthRBACFirebaseMongoDB
View live deployment →
FILE 02 AI / LEGAL OPERATIONS

LexiVerdict — AI Legal Case Management

An AI-assisted platform for real-time legal case tracking, built for a world with three very different users in one system: advocates, clients, and court officials. It uses AI to classify incoming case documents, summarize them, and surface key clauses and risk flags automatically, cutting down the manual read-through legal teams usually can't avoid. Encryption and role-based access ensure sensitive case material stays visible only to the people cleared to see it.

AI Document AnalysisRBACEncryptionCase Tracking
View live deployment →
FILE 03 DOCUMENT INTELLIGENCE

Resumify

A terminal-themed resume hosting platform: upload a standard resume PDF and Resumify's AI parses it into a fully structured JSON schema — no manual data entry, no fake filler data. Once parsed, the resume can be edited online and published instantly, viewable by anyone through a single terminal command, npx resumify <username>, in the same spirit as reading someone's dev profile straight from the CLI. Authentication runs through GitHub sign-in, keeping publishing tied to a real developer identity.

AI PDF ParsingGitHub OAuthCLI Toolnpx
View live deployment →
FILE 04 AI / FINANCIAL IDENTITY

GigScore AI

Gig workers in India rarely have a payslip, but they almost always have a UPI history — GigScore AI turns that history into a financial identity banks can actually use. A worker drops in a UPI statement PDF from PhonePe, GPay, or Paytm, the AI analyses transaction patterns, and a bank-ready GigScore report is generated in under 60 seconds, built for a workforce of roughly 450 million people who are otherwise invisible to formal credit systems. Data is processed for scoring only and deleted afterward — nothing raw is stored.

AI ScoringUPI Data AnalysisFinancial Inclusion
View live deployment →
FILE 05 ACADEMIC ANALYTICS

CGPA Tracker

A full-stack academic tracker built specifically around Anna University's grading scale — because generic GPA calculators never quite fit. Students upload semester result PDFs, which are parsed automatically and turned into a running CGPA history, with authentication keeping each student's academic record private. Built end-to-end with React on the frontend and a Node.js/Express/MongoDB backend, secured with JWT.

ReactNode.js / ExpressMongoDBJWTPDF Parsing
View live deployment →
